Chronology of every recorded fact about [[halfsilver]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Halfsilver is a primary mineral output from the mines of Mount Venture.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — Halfsilver is a material that is more brittle than silver but has disruptive effects on madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon possesses a halfsilver dagger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Whitehall brandishes a halfsilver dagger.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Halfsilver is a rare metal that looks like stars stuck in silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Halfsilver is a rare material.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Halfsilver is used in the form of rectangular tokens or chips.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon's ring is made of halfsilver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Halfsilver disperses madra when it contacts it.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Halfsilver is a material found in veins within steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The cuffs Lindon is wearing contain halfsilver.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Halfsilver represents the rank of Lord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Halfsilver interferes with the orderly control of madra.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
